{ MiniMain_crypto -- tiny main-strategy fixture for burner golden tests }

inputs:
    Length( 20 ),
    BandMult( 0.0 ),
    ATRMult( 3.0 ),
    ReentryBars( 0 ) ;

variables:
    ATRv( 0 ),
    UpLvl( 0 ),
    DnLvl( 0 ) ;

{ ---- levels ---- }
ATRv = AvgTrueRange( 14 ) ;
UpLvl = Highest( High, Length )[1] + BandMult * ATRv ;
DnLvl = Lowest( Low, Length )[1] - BandMult * ATRv ;

if MarketPosition = 0 then
begin
    Buy ( "MmLE" ) next bar at UpLvl stop ;
    SellShort ( "MmSE" ) next bar at DnLvl stop ;
end ;

if MarketPosition = 1 then
    Sell ( "MmLX" ) next bar at UpLvl - ATRMult * ATRv stop ;
if MarketPosition = -1 then
    BuyToCover ( "MmSX" ) next bar at DnLvl + ATRMult * ATRv stop ;
